keter.meaning: Crown - The highest will, pure divine will
keter.teaching: Keter is the root of all Sefirot, where divine light begins to contract. It is Ein Sof - the Infinite.
keter.key_text: Keter is Ein Sof; the first circle closest to Ein Sof. Before emanation, it filled all reality.

chokmah.meaning: Wisdom - Flash of insight, creative potential
chokmah.letter: Yod (י) - smallest letter, point of potential
chokmah.consciousness: Flash of insight, first spark of creation
chokmah.teaching: Chochma is potential before actualization. The light of expansion from Ein Sof.
chokmah.key_text: Hochma is the light of the expansion from Ein Sof - potential that has not appeared in practice.

binah.position: Left side, below Keter, opposite Chokmah
binah.consciousness: Analytical mind, developing insight into form
binah.teaching: Binah takes the flash of Chokmah and develops it fully. The light that intensified to increase abundance.
binah.key_text: Bina is the light of Hochma that intensified to grow coarser - actualization of potential.

chesed.teaching: The desire to give without limit. Pure light of Hassadim (loving-kindness).
chesed.key_text: Chesed is the desire to give without limit - expansion of divine light into creation.

gevurah.teaching: The power to say no, to set boundaries on expansion. Also called Din (Judgment).
gevurah.key_text: Gevurah is the power of restriction - necessary to give form to Chesed's expansion.

tiferet.teaching: The heart that balances mercy and judgment. Also called Rachamim (Compassion).
tiferet.key_text: Tiferet is the synthesis of all Sefirot - the heart that receives from all and gives to all.

netzach.teaching: The endurance to see things through. Victory through persistence.
netzach.key_text: Netzach is the endurance of divine light - the persistence that overcomes all obstacles.

hod.position: Left side, below Tiferet, opposite Netzach
hod.teaching: The splendor that comes from surrender and humility.
hod.key_text: Hod is the splendor of surrender - acknowledging the divine in humility.

yesod.teaching: The Tzadik (righteous one) is the foundation of the world. Connects upper and lower.
yesod.key_text: Yesod is the channel through which all divine abundance flows to Malkuth - the connector.

malkuth.nature: Receiving vessel for all upper lights
malkuth.teaching: Malkuth is the vessel that receives all divine abundance. The Shekhinah dwells here.
malkuth.key_text: Malkuth receives from all Sefirot - it is the manifestation, the Shekhinah, divine presence in creation.

concepts.tzimtzum: The First Restriction - Divine light withdrew to create space for finite beings.
concepts.kav: The Line - Channel through which divine abundance flows from Ein Sof to creation.
concepts.partzufim: Five Divine Countenances: Arich Anpin, Abba, Imma, Zeir Anpin, Nukva
concepts.orr_chokmah: Light of Wisdom - The vitality itself
concepts.orr_hassadim: Light of Loving-kindness - Clothing for Chochma
concepts.shekhinah: Divine Presence - Dwells in Malkuth, the feminine aspect
concepts.ein_sof: The Infinite - Before restriction, filled all reality
